mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS falls or stays below its recent trend, discount rates ease and equity valuation multiples expand, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not positive on average when FEDFUNDS is declining, or if the signal's rolling 2-year Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above its recent level signals labor-market deterioration and weaker future demand, which lowers earnings expectations and drives negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations deliver positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases or if the average return after trigger events is not below unconditional baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous improvement in RSAFS and GDPC1 indicates broad demand growth that supports revenue expectations and lift in S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if joint expansions in RSAFS and GDPC1 do not outperform independent single-series effects, or if 60-day forward returns are not positive in the top quartile of the combined signal.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO rises from a low base, industrial output confirms cyclical recovery and improving profit expectations, which should generate positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO surprise events fail to produce above-baseline 5-day SPX returns or if the post-trigger hit rate is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in HOUST indicates weakening housing demand and tighter spillovers to consumer activity, which should pressure S&P 500 returns negatively over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if below-trend HOUST periods do not correspond to negative 60-day SPX performance or if the signal's rolling 3-year Rank IC remains below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of high FEDFUNDS and elevated CPIAUCSL implies restrictive real policy pressure, compressing multiples and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS > 4.5% and CPIAUCSL trend remains positive
failure_condition: Reject if the joint high-rate/high-inflation regime fails to produce lower-than-baseline 20-day SPX returns, or if either proxy alone explains the effect equally well.

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle expansion, a stable or falling UNRATE combined with rising PAYEMS confirms resilient employment, supporting earnings visibility and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the combined labor-strength signal does not outperform either series separately, or if positive 20-day SPX returns do not exceed 55% in the top signal tercile.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 weakens while RSAFS also slows, the joint demand shortfall signals falling revenue momentum and should lead to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 growth turns negative and RSAFS growth decelerates for 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: Reject if joint demand weakening does not predict worse 60-day SPX returns than baseline, or if the negative effect disappears after controlling for either proxy alone.
